message:
feat(mcp): add input validation for description, estimated_minutes, and external_ref

MCP tool handlers (create_issue, update_issue) now enforce field constraints
before writing to storage, providing clear error messages to agents:

- description: reject if byte length exceeds MAX_DESCRIPTION_BYTES
- estimated_minutes: reject if outside 0..=MAX_ESTIMATED_MINUTES range,
  applied to both integer and string-coerced inputs
- external_ref: reject if character count exceeds MAX_EXTERNAL_REF_CHARS
  or if it contains whitespace (external refs are identifiers, not prose)

Previously these constraints were only enforced at the storage/validation
layer, producing less actionable error messages for MCP consumers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
